goal: For each file path in a list, read the file and check whether it contains a target phrase. If any file matches, write a pretty JSON report to disk describing which files matched and whether each one matched; otherwise run pytest in the project, summarize the output, and prefix each line of the summary with a status label. Return the final artifact or report path.
notes: This is intentionally beyond the current clean frontier.
It mixes looped file processing, generated predicates, branching, report generation, and environment effects.
Use it to inspect whether Graphsmith decomposes into sensible regions and where it starts collapsing.
